name: Survey 3 UX patterns
description: Survey 3 UX patterns for a feature and estimate rough effort.
prompt_template: Survey 3 UX patterns for: {input} and estimate rough effort for each.

name: Identify 2 data flows
description: Identify 2 alternative data flows for a feature and map touchpoints.
prompt_template: Identify 2 data flows for: {input} and map touchpoints.

name: Evidence-based UX options
description: Evaluate 3 UX options with pros/cons and rough effort.
prompt_template: Evaluate 3 UX options for: {input} with pros/cons and rough effort.

name: Prototype navigation skeleton
description: Draft a skeleton navigation flow and interaction patterns.
prompt_template: Draft a skeleton navigation flow and interactions for: {input}.

name: Heuristic UX evaluation
description: Apply a UX heuristic evaluation to a proposed UI concept.
prompt_template: Apply a UX heuristic evaluation to: {input}.

name: Data touchpoint mapping
description: Map data touchpoints across modules for a feature.
prompt_template: Map data touchpoints across modules for: {input}.

name: Micro-interaction spec
description: Draft micro-interactions for a key UI path.

name: A/B test plan
description: Create a high-level A/B testing plan for a UX feature.
prompt_template: Create a high-level A/B testing plan for: {input}.
